auth.rejected: Signature cancelled. Connect and sign to enter.
auth.signToEnter: Sign the message in your wallet to enter the game.

devnetWarning.title: You are on Devnet
devnetWarning.subtitle: Test environment — no real SOL
devnetWarning.body: This environment uses Solana Devnet — no real SOL is involved. To join paid tables you need Devnet SOL in your wallet.
devnetWarning.stepConnect: Connect your wallet (Phantom, Solflare, etc.). The app follows the server network automatically.
devnetWarning.stepFaucet: Request free Devnet SOL from the official faucet (link below) or use your wallet's Devnet airdrop if available.
devnetWarning.stepDeposit: Once funded, create or join a paid table — the escrow deposit uses Devnet SOL only.

donate.title: Send donations
donate.note: Thank you for your support — every contribution helps keep SOL TTT running.

hardwareAccel.title: Hardware acceleration recommended
hardwareAccel.software: Your browser is using software rendering. The 3D board may be slow or unstable.
hardwareAccel.unavailable: WebGL is not available. The 3D board may not work correctly.
hardwareAccel.hint: Enable hardware acceleration in your browser settings (Chrome/Edge: Settings → System; Firefox: Preferences → General) and reload the page.

orientation.title: Rotate your phone
orientation.body: For a better view of the 3D board, turn your device to landscape (horizontal) mode.

wallet.title: Connect wallet
wallet.description: Choose a Solana wallet to continue
wallet.connectSubtitle: Connect a wallet on Solana to continue

footer.mockEscrowHint: Simulated mode — no SOL will be debited

profile.youDisconnectedNotice: You left — rejoin within {{time}} or you forfeit.
profile.opponentDisconnectedNotice: Opponent left — waiting {{time}} for them to return.

rules.title: Match rules
rules.forfeit: Leaving permanently or not returning within 1 minute forfeits your stake to your opponent.
rules.winner: The winner receives the full pot minus the house rake.
rules.draw: Draws only occur on stalemate or insufficient material. Repetition and the fifty-move rule do not end the game — play must continue until checkmate or a mandatory draw.
rules.timeout: Running out of time or failing to reconnect within 1 minute counts as a loss.
rules.escrow: Stakes are locked in on-chain escrow until the match is settled.
rules.cancelEarly: Canceling before 1:30 of waiting for an opponent forfeits your full entry to the house as a fee.
rules.waitingDisconnect: If you leave the waiting room for more than 40 seconds, your table closes and your entry goes to the house as a fee.
rules.rating: ELO: ranked and tournaments count. Casual and custom stakes do not change rating.

elo.helpLabel: How ELO works in this match
elo.notSymmetric: Gains and losses are not symmetric — they depend on opponent ELO.
elo.stakeMultiplier: Stake multiplier ×{{multiplier}} — gains and losses scale equally.
elo.tournamentMultiplier: Tournament difficulty ×{{multiplier}} — higher impact on the same ELO.
elo.tournamentNote: Tournament: each duel changes tournament ELO; SOL prize only for the champion.

arena.ratingCountsHint: Wins and losses change your ELO rating
arena.ratingNoCountHint: This mode does not affect your rating

ranked.name: Ranked Ladder
ranked.subtitle: Climb the ladder · minimum SOL stake

casual1v1.name: Casual 1v1
casual1v1.subtitle: Quick match · 3 min + 2 s/move · no stakes · no rating

custom1v1.name: Custom stake
custom1v1.subtitle: Min 0.10 SOL · choose your stake · no rating

ranked1v1.name: Ranked 1v1
ranked1v1.subtitle: Ranked ELO · min 0.10 SOL · higher stake = bigger ELO swings

rankedPresets1v1.name: Ranked · fixed stake
rankedPresets1v1.subtitle: 0.10 SOL entry · 10 min · ELO matchmaking · 2% rake

tournament12.name: Sol Grand Prix
tournament12.subtitle: 12 players · 1 SOL · 10 min/player · counts ELO rating

tournament4.name: Lightning Cup
tournament4.subtitle: 4 players · 0.15 SOL · 5 min + 2 s/move · counts ELO

tournament6.name: Ascension Cup
tournament6.subtitle: 6 players · 0.25 SOL · 6 min + 2 s/move · counts ELO

tournament8.name: Crown Cup
tournament8.subtitle: 8 players · 0.50 SOL · 8 min + 1 s/move · counts ELO

tournament.hint: Single elimination — each round is 1v1 and counts ELO rating. Larger brackets use shorter clocks. Winner takes the full entry pool (minus rake).

bracket.title: Bracket
bracket.eliminated: You were eliminated from this tournament.

waitRoom.waitingSubtitle: Your victory is confirmed. The bracket will update when your next opponent is ready.
waitRoom.eliminatedSubtitle: You can watch the bracket update or return to the lobby.

match.rejoinBody: Return to the board to continue playing.
match.youDisconnected: You left — {{time}} left to rejoin before forfeit.
match.opponentDisconnected: Opponent disconnected — {{time}} left for them to return.

play.title: Play 1 vs 1
play.hint: Winner takes the pot minus house rake · Loser gets nothing · no rating change
play.hintFree: Casual match — no stakes and no rating · connect a wallet for SOL modes
play.hintOpenTableFree: Opens a table in the list — wait for an opponent or join an existing one
play.hintNoRating: This mode does not change your ELO rating — play for fun and stakes only
play.hintOpenTable: {{amount}} SOL · opens a table — join from open tables or wait for an opponent

ranked.hint: {{amount}} SOL · ELO matchmaking — tap Play to find an opponent
ranked.hintOpenTable: {{amount}} SOL · opens a ranked table at your stake — join from open tables or wait for a match

openTables.title: Open Tables
openTables.sortedByRatingLegacy: Sorted by closest rating to you ({{rating}})
openTables.empty: No open tables. Tap <1>Play 1 vs 1</1> to create one.
openTables.emptyGuest: No open tables. Tap <1>Play 1 vs 1</1> to start a free match.
openTables.emptyTournament: No open tables — use Join tournament to fill the queue.
openTables.tournamentQueueHint: Players waiting to start the bracket.
openTables.searchPlaceholder: Search player, wallet, or match code…

lobby.connectWallet: Connect your wallet to play 1v1 for SOL
lobby.guestModesLocked: Connect your Solana wallet to play ranked, custom stakes, and tournaments.

waiting.title: Waiting room
waiting.creator: Waiting for an opponent to join and fund…
waiting.creatorFree: Waiting for an opponent to join your table…
waiting.creatorPaid: Waiting for an opponent to join your table…
waiting.fundPrompt: Confirm the SOL deposit in your wallet to start the match
waiting.visibleInList: Your table is visible in Open Tables — anyone can join.
waiting.disconnectPolicy: If you leave for more than 40 seconds, your table closes and your entry goes to the house as a fee.
waiting.cancelPolicyWait: After {{waitTime}} of waiting you can cancel with a full refund. {{remaining}} left — canceling before that forfeits your entry to the house.
waiting.cancelPolicyRefundReady: You waited {{waitTime}} — canceling now refunds your entry.
waiting.cancelEarlyConfirm: Cancel before {{waitTime}} of waiting? Your SOL entry will NOT be refunded — the full amount goes to the house as a fee.
waiting.cancelEarlyDescription: {{remaining}} left until {{waitTime}} — then you can cancel with a refund.
waiting.cancelEarlyWarning: If you cancel now, your SOL entry will not be refunded — the full amount goes to the house as a fee.

game.resignConfirmHint: You will lose this match. This action cannot be undone.
game.resignConfirmHintBet: You will lose the match and your bet goes to your opponent.
game.resignForfeitWarning: Resigning forfeits your stake to your opponent.
game.boardUnavailable: Could not load the board. Return to the lobby and try again.
game.modalDescription: Chess board in a modal window

reason.checkmateLoss: Checkmate — your king has no escape.
reason.timeoutWin: Your opponent ran out of time.
reason.disconnectWin: Your opponent left and did not return in time.
reason.disconnectLoss: You left and did not return in time.
reason.stalemate: Stalemate — mandatory draw under the rules of chess.
reason.draw: Insufficient material — mandatory draw under the rules of chess.

gameResult.freeCongrats: Well played! No stakes in this match.
gameResult.tournamentAdvance: You advance to the next round.
gameResult.tournamentEliminated: You were eliminated from the tournament.
gameResult.tournamentNoPayoutYet: Tournament prizes are only paid when you win the entire event.

damas3d.disconnectOpponentBody: They have {{time}} to return. The game clock is paused.
damas3d.disconnectOpponentFootnote: If they don't reconnect in time, you win the game.
damas3d.disconnectSelfBody: Reconnect within {{time}} or you forfeit the game.

training.title: Practice vs CPU
training.loadError: Could not load the board. Please try again.

profileSettings.onboardingSubtitle: Choose a unique nickname and photo — other players will see this in open tables.
profileSettings.editSubtitle: Update your public nickname and avatar.
profileSettings.walletHint: Connect with your wallet to save a public profile.

customize.title: Customize
customize.subtitle: Pick your board and piece style — saved on this device.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Control panel

gate.title: Admin Access · 3 steps
gate.subtitle: Authorized email, Google account, and wallet are all required.
gate.googleHint: Use the authorized Google account to continue.
gate.googleOriginHint: If you see origin_mismatch, add {{origin}} in Google Cloud → Credentials → Authorized JavaScript origins.
gate.googleOriginMismatch: origin_mismatch: register {{origin}} in Google Cloud Console (Credentials → OAuth client → Authorized JavaScript origins). The admin path is not used — domain only.
gate.googleNotConfigured: Set VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in admin and GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID on the server.
gate.walletHint: Phantom or Jupiter — authorized wallet only. Used for login, not fee collection.
gate.walletModalHint: Choose Phantom or Jupiter in the Solana wallet modal.
gate.walletRequired: Connect the authorized wallet before continuing.
gate.walletSignUnsupported: This wallet cannot sign messages. Use Phantom or Solflare.
gate.sessionExpired: Session expired — start again from email.

admin.loginPlatformsHint: Platforms configured externally (admin-platforms.json / env). Nothing hardcoded in source.
admin.walletLoginHint: Connect an authorized wallet and sign in.
admin.loginHint: Choose the login platform configured on the server.

clients.title: Clients (wallet sign-in)
clients.hint: Players who connected a wallet and appear in the database. Spend is summed from paid match receipts.

games.statsHint: Lobby creations and completed games from the match log.
games.recentHint: Latest settled matches with on-chain receipts.

modes.title: Lobby availability
modes.hint: Control whether each carousel mode is playable. Choose Open, Coming soon, or Closed — the lobby shows the matching banner and blocks play on the server.

analytics.liveHint: Active WebSocket connections on this server instance (refreshes every 15s on this tab).
analytics.visitsHint: Page pings from the public app (unique visitors per UTC day).
analytics.noVisits: No visit data yet — traffic will appear after users load the site.

admin.bankHint: Immutable record of rake, payouts and settlements — stored in MongoDB.
admin.escrowReadyHint: Program deployed, GlobalConfig initialized, and fee wallet configured.
admin.escrowNotReadyHint: Complete the items below to enable real-stake matches.
admin.escrowRpcHint: The Solana endpoint hit a rate limit. Wait a few seconds and click Refresh, or set RPC_URL to a dedicated provider.
admin.rakeBpsBannerBody: This value stores the cap at on-chain init (GlobalConfig). Open matches keep their game-mode rake.
admin.rakeBpsBannerFootnote: 100 bps = 1%. Changing this does not update active matches.
admin.productionNetworkHint: Controls which Solana cluster the server and public app use. Switch to Mainnet only after funding the authority wallet and deploying the program on mainnet.
admin.productionNetworkConfirm: I confirm the mainnet authority is funded and the program is ready for real SOL
admin.productionNetworkConfirmRequired: Check the confirmation box before enabling Mainnet.

wallet.title: House wallet
wallet.hint: Withdraw rake and operational balances. Max amount already applies min reserve, network fee buffer, per-tx cap, and daily limit.
wallet.mockBlocked: Mock escrow is on — disable it under Settings to withdraw.
wallet.limitReserve: Min reserve at source: {{sol}} SOL (cannot be withdrawn)
wallet.limitTxBuffer: Network fee buffer per tx: {{sol}} SOL
wallet.limitsFootnote: Max withdrawable = min(balance − reserve − buffer, per-tx cap, daily remaining). Player escrow is not included in these balances.

errors.modeMismatch: This table belongs to a different game mode
errors.alreadyHosting: You already have an open table — cancel it before opening another
errors.walletRequired: Connect your wallet for this mode
errors.guestSessionLoading: Starting guest session… try again in a moment
errors.guestSessionFailed: Could not start a guest session. The server may be offline — try again later.
errors.signInRequired: Sign in with your wallet to open paid tables
errors.walletConnectForTx: Connect your wallet to confirm the on-chain transaction
errors.escrowNotReady: On-chain escrow unavailable. Check server config and network.
errors.mockEscrowActive: Simulated mode active — no SOL will be debited. Set MOCK_ESCROW=false on the server and restart for real Devnet payments.
errors.escrowDevnetOnly: Paid tables require Devnet. Change network in the header.
errors.configFailed: Could not reach the server. Reload the page.
errors.walletNoSign: Your wallet cannot sign transactions in this browser.
errors.drawNotAllowed: That move would force a draw by repetition or the fifty-move rule. Choose another move — only stalemate or insufficient material can end in a draw.
